jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at CONCOR
jsonLd.description:
Join the CONCOR family as a Fleet Manager in Gurgaon. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About CONCOR:
CONCOR is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CONCOR!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
